title: Photo Retouching Specialist Needed
task_type: Basic Retouch — Brightness/Contrast + Color Correction (20+ photos)
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (ingest the 20+ photos, looped) -> image_apply_auto_tone (fast baseline across the set) -> image_adjust_brightness_and_contrast (the stated primary task) -> image_adjust_color_temperature + image_adjust_hsl (colour correction) -> image_adjust_vibrance_and_saturation (subtle finish) -> image_list_presets/image_apply_preset (save one correction and batch-apply for consistency across all 20+) -> asset_preview_file
original_brief:
I'm looking for a skilled photo editor to work on over 20 photos. The primary tasks involve basic retouching, specifically brightness and contrast adjustments, and color correction. 

Ideal Skills and Experience:
- Proficiency in photo editing software (e.g., Adobe Photoshop, Lightroom)
- Strong understanding of color theory and image composition
- Attention to detail
- Previous experience with similar projects

Please share samples of your previous work.

client_persona.tagline: Cultivating Joy, One Day at a Time
client_persona.voice: Our tone is warm, inviting, and authentic, reflecting the everyday beauty of home and family life. We aim to be relatable and inspiring, fostering a sense of community and gentle guidance.

assets.input_requirement: The 20+ photos the client will provide

generator.prompt: High-quality well-exposed photograph, perfect white balance and natural color: Portrait of an elderly woman smiling gently while watering houseplants in a sunlit room.. Sharp focus, balanced contrast, professional but candid feel. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

issues: Slightly artificial texture on the woman's hair and skin, typical of AI generation but not overly distracting.

assets.input_requirement: The 20+ photos the client will provide

generator.prompt: High-quality well-exposed photograph, perfect white balance and natural color: Candid shot of a young man reading a book on a comfortable sofa with a mug of tea.. Sharp focus, balanced contrast, professional but candid feel. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

assets.input_requirement: The 20+ photos the client will provide

generator.prompt: High-quality well-exposed photograph, perfect white balance and natural color: A child (approx. 5-7 years old, diverse ethnicity) laughing while playing with building blocks on a rug.. Sharp focus, balanced contrast, professional but candid feel. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

issues: The image is slightly soft in focus, especially around the child's hair, which affects sharpness.
The lighting is natural but a bit flat, lacking contrast that would add depth to the photo.

issues: The fire in the fireplace looks slightly artificial compared to the rest of the scene, which is otherwise very natural and well-composed.

decisions.requirement: The 20+ photos the client will provide
decisions.assumed_value: Pilot batch: 10 photos (of the 20+), each generated pristine then programmatically degraded; pristine originals kept in originals/ as ground truth
decisions.why: 10 exercises every degradation profile; originals give an objective before/after for the Adobe run.

decisions.requirement: Whether a single consistent correction should apply to all (batch preset) or per-image treatment
decisions.assumed_value: Per-image correction with a shared baseline (auto-tone first, then targeted fixes) — degradations differ per photo
decisions.why: The degrade profiles vary (warm/cool/over/under), so one preset cannot fix all; matches the workflow's preset+adjust chain.

decisions.requirement: Subject matter of the photos (affects skin-tone protection during colour correction) — confirm
decisions.assumed_value: Mixed set: 3 portraits / 3 interiors / 2 food / 2 outdoor-product (portraits force skin-tone-aware correction)
decisions.why: Deliberately includes skin tones to test the hard part of color correction.

decisions.requirement: Output format/dimensions — confirm with client; brief doesn't state
decisions.why: Brief silent; standard for retouch hand-back.
